description: The Rockford crime family was an Italian American Mafia crime family based in Rockford, Illinois, founded around 1920 by Antonio Musso. It operated independently from the nearby Chicago Outfit, engaging in racketeering, gambling, loan sharking, and murder. The family was led by Joseph Zammuto from 1957 to 1974, then by Frank Buscemi until its decline in the early 2000s.
